reasoning: The root cause was identified as severe packet loss on the F1-c (Control Plane) interface between the O-CU and O-DU. This led to a loss of synchronization and control, which subsequently affected the F1-u, E2, and A1 interfaces, as well as the O-CU, O-DU, and both RICs (Near-RT and Non-RT).
actionable_steps: 1. Physical & Link Layer Audit: Inspect transport network and physical cabling between O-CU and O-DU. 2. Interface Configuration Check: Verify F1-c configurations for MTU mismatches or VLAN tagging errors. 3. Hardware Diagnostics: Perform health checks on NICs of both O-CU and O-DU.
